nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Index page for a vendored Claude Code agent skill covering the Mediabunny multimedia library, pointing to sub-guides for reading audio duration, video dimensions, and video duration.
nodes.languageNotes: This is bundled third-party agent-skill documentation (not versus-engine application code) that teaches an AI agent how to use the Mediabunny library within this repo's tooling.

nodes.name: get-audio-duration.md
nodes.summary: Reference snippet showing how to compute an audio file's duration in seconds with Mediabunny's Input/UrlSource API, including variants for Remotion's staticFile() and Node.js/Bun FileSource.

nodes.name: get-video-dimensions.md
nodes.summary: Reference snippet showing how to read a video file's width and height via Mediabunny's primary video track, with variants for remote URLs, local files, and Remotion's staticFile().

nodes.name: get-video-duration.md
nodes.summary: Reference snippet showing how to compute a video file's duration in seconds with Mediabunny's Input/UrlSource API, including variants for Remotion's public/ staticFile() usage and Node.js/Bun FileSource.
